forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 56. West southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 66, with temperatures falling to around 64 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

weather_report:
As the night deepens in Downtown San Francisco, a gentle cloak of clouds wraps the city, holding onto the cool, ambient air that settles around 56 degrees. The winds whisper at a mild 7 mph, hinting at the truce between land and sea. Clouds dance as shadows over the cityscape, a soft reminder of the fog that often embraces the coastal void. While the stars take a shy bow, the night remains predominantly clear, allowing the city lights to flicker like scattered jewels across the landscape.

Expect the morning to awaken with a transition—a warm sunshine filtering through the veil. Temperatures will gently climb towards the mid-60s, fading into a cool refuge by afternoon. The afternoon breeze, carrying notes of salt and sun, will wrap around you at 5 to 13 mph, enlivening the spirit without overwhelming the senses. This blend of warmth and undertones of chill suggests layering would be wise; a light cardigan or a casual jacket will serve you well, navigating the subtleties of the day. Such conditions invite a leisurely morning coffee in one of the quaint local cafés or perhaps a stroll along the waterfront, where the fog kisses the bay, offering serene moments that breathe life into the rhythm of city living.
